item.title: About
item.description: About Who: Miles Tjandrawidjaja Why: Help When: Now, call me Where: Kitchener, Ontario, Canada What: Software Developer, Psuedo Philosopher Everything found here are of my own opinion. Thoughts and beliefs I’ve held during some point in time. What you read will not always be representative of my views a year, month, day or even minutes after the post date. I will not necessarily strive for correctness. Finding absolute truth is much too hard, perhaps even non-existent.
